domain: Finance / algorithmic trading / execution governance / market structure
task: Write a sophisticated, client-shareable report that designs and evaluates an adaptive execution intelligence system for algorithmic trading under current June 2026 market conditions.

deliverable_requirements.tone: institutional, precise, finance-native, visionary but not promotional
must_include: A clear thesis that execution quality is now a real-time intelligence/governance problem.
A current-event market setup using the provided source pack only.
A system architecture with data inputs, decision modules, controls, and audit outputs.
A multi-interval segmentation from event-time/sub-second through T+1/funding/clearing horizons.
A benchmark framework: VWAP/TWAP/arrival price/implementation shortfall/POV plus conditional peer/venue/portfolio-weight benchmarks.
A portfolio-aware decision policy: continue, slow, accelerate, pause, reroute, cross, dark/lit split, hedge, resize, or escalate.
A risk/compliance section grounded in FINRA/SEC-style controls: testing, validation, kill switches, model logs, and post-trade review.
A model-risk section explaining why single AI agents can amplify recency/extrapolation and why adversarial multi-model review matters.
A practical implementation roadmap with instrumentation and success metrics.
Explicit statement that this is not investment advice and does not recommend buying/selling any security.
must_not_include: No live trading instructions or specific security buy/sell recommendations.
No unsupported current-market claims outside the source pack.
No claims that Holo executes trades or has real brokerage access.
No legal advice; only operational/regulatory-aware framing.
No free browsing by models during generation.

holo_turn_design.final_turn_guard: Turn 6 must create a candidate final report. Governor then runs deterministic validity gates on Turn 5 and Turn 6 before quality comparison. Incomplete, truncated, disclaimer-missing, source-invalid, process-contaminated, or out-of-band candidates cannot be selected for clean scoring. Governor then selects the stronger valid final artifact or requires a surgical merge. Turn 6 must not degrade Turn 5.
holo_turn_design.governor_job: At each turn, produce a distilled mission packet with specific technical probe questions. Gov must pressure-test order flow, benchmarks, portfolio weights, funding/settlement, controls, model risk, source grounding, and client credibility before assigning the next role objective.

post_turn_6_governor_gate.instruction: After Turn 6, Gov checks Turn 5 and Turn 6 with deterministic validity gates before quality comparison. Incomplete, truncated, disclaimer-missing, source-invalid, process-contaminated, or out-of-band candidates cannot be selected for clean scoring. Gov then compares valid candidates against the brief, source pack, rubric, and word-count band, and selects Turn 5, Turn 6, or requires a surgical merge. The judged final artifact is Gov-selected, not automatically Turn 6.

judge_design.judge_internet_policy: No browsing; score against the frozen source pack.
